extracted_json.title: Definitions: Functions and Dimensions

items.text: (1) Function refers to organizational functions: Engineering, Manufacturing, Marketing, Finance, ...
(2) Each of these functions has important dimensions: For example, the key dimensions of engineering are product performance, critical skills, ...

blocks.text: You are now ready to attempt HW #2, Prob.1: The Disk Drive Industry

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Definitions of organizational functions and their dimensions, with a Seagate/Intel example and a functional map.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Notes defining "function" as organizational functions (engineering, manufacturing, marketing, finance) and the idea that each function has key dimensions (e.g., product performance, critical skills for engineering). A tree diagram maps a tech company (Seagate) to functions and their dimensions, and an example chain traces Company (Intel) → Function (Engineering) → Dimension (Performance / chip density) → Functional Map (Moore's Law). Concludes by pointing to HW #2, Prob.1 on the disk drive industry.

transcription:
Definitions:
 (1) Function refers to organizational functions:
      Engineering, Manufacturing, Marketing,
      Finance, ...

 (2) Each of these functions has important
      dimensions:
       For example, the key dimensions of
       engineering are product performance, critical
       skills, ...

[figure]

Example: [figure]

You are now ready to attempt
   HW #2, Prob.1: The Disk Drive Industry
